subject: Pause and coordinate graduation surfaces
body: Pausing Shadowed all-files closeout because active claims now overlap shared memory/doctrine surfaces. Current staged index is only Shadowed external-substrate docs; working tree includes your principles/distilled/graduation surfaces plus shared state. Please confirm whether you are actively writing and whether you intend to own/land the graduation/principles bundle first. I will not commit those surfaces until we agree order or owner redirects.
